title: Duplicate debit on business expense card
subject: Duplicate debit on business expense card
message: A vendor payment made using our NexaPay business expense card appears to have been debited twice. Please confirm whether one of the debits will be automatically reversed.
resolution_summary: Support raised a duplicate debit review request and advised the customer that the excess debit would be investigated with the payment processor.
summary: Support raised a duplicate debit review request and advised the customer that the excess debit would be investigated with the payment processor.

title: Vendor payout settlement not received
subject: Vendor payout settlement not received
message: One of our vendor settlements still has not reached the beneficiary account even though it was marked successful in the dashboard.
resolution_summary: Support confirmed settlement was delayed during bank-side processing and later completed.
summary: Support confirmed settlement was delayed during bank-side processing and later completed.

title: Refund follow-up for failed payout fee
subject: Refund follow-up for failed payout fee
message: We were charged a payout processing fee for a failed business transfer. Please confirm when the fee refund will be credited.
resolution_summary: Refund review opened; finance team approval pending.
summary: Refund review opened; finance team approval pending.

title: Refund timeline for cancelled card order
subject: Refund timeline for cancelled card order
message: I cancelled my physical card request last week. By when will the refund for the card fee be credited?
resolution_summary: Support confirmed refund would be processed within 5 to 7 working days.
summary: Support confirmed refund would be processed within 5 to 7 working days.

title: Virtual card activation help
subject: Virtual card activation help
message: I generated a virtual card but I’m not sure whether it is already active for online payments.
resolution_summary: Support shared the activation steps and confirmed the card was ready for online use.
summary: Support shared the activation steps and confirmed the card was ready for online use.

title: UPI payment flagged as suspicious by mistake
subject: UPI payment flagged as suspicious by mistake
message: One of my UPI payments to a grocery merchant was flagged as suspicious and the transaction was declined even though it was a normal payment.
resolution_summary: Support confirmed the transaction had been flagged by automated risk checks and removed the temporary hold after verification.
summary: Support confirmed the transaction had been flagged by automated risk checks and removed the temporary hold after verification.

title: KYC verification still pending
subject: KYC verification still pending
message: I uploaded the required business KYC documents three days ago, but the verification status still shows pending.
resolution_summary: Support confirmed the documents were under manual compliance review and asked the customer to wait for verification completion.
summary: Support confirmed the documents were under manual compliance review and asked the customer to wait for verification completion.

title: Need to update registered business email
subject: Need to update registered business email
message: We need to update the registered email address for our business account before the next billing cycle.
resolution_summary: Support guided the customer through the verified business email update process.
summary: Support guided the customer through the verified business email update process.

title: Account restricted after document resubmission
subject: Account restricted after document resubmission
message: After re-uploading our business KYC documents, our account access was restricted and outgoing payouts are now blocked.
resolution_summary: Compliance review escalated; account restriction remains until document verification is completed.
summary: Compliance review escalated; account restriction remains until document verification is completed.

title: Suspicious debit from linked account
subject: Suspicious debit from linked account
message: A debit was attempted from our linked account that we do not recognize. Please investigate immediately and confirm whether the transaction was blocked.
resolution_summary: Fraud operations reviewed the transaction, blocked the debit, and marked the account for additional security monitoring.
summary: Fraud operations reviewed the transaction, blocked the debit, and marked the account for additional security monitoring.

title: Need confirmation on beneficiary transfer limit
subject: Need confirmation on beneficiary transfer limit
message: Please confirm the transfer limit applicable to our beneficiary account for same-day business payouts.
resolution_summary: Support shared the current beneficiary transfer limit and applicable compliance checks for higher-value payouts.
summary: Support shared the current beneficiary transfer limit and applicable compliance checks for higher-value payouts.

title: Duplicate debit on premium business card
subject: Duplicate debit on premium business card
message: A premium business card transaction appears to have been debited twice for the same merchant payment. Please review urgently and send updates by email.
resolution_summary: Dispute review opened and customer requested email-based follow-up updates.
summary: Dispute review opened and customer requested email-based follow-up updates.
